quotes.selection: I'll show you what discipline really means.
general: My bullets never miss. They can't.
I don't waste ammo, or words.
Bravery doesn't mean recklessness. Keep your heads cool.
I'll turn your flames into bullets.
I don't laugh. I don't smile. That's not my job.
I was a soldier before a firefighter. I won't let anyone forget that.
One bullet, one target. That's my creed.

1: Captain Obi, I'll cover the front. Leave the rest to me.
Shinra ID to be specified: Shinra, control your flames, or I'll put them to better use myself.
Maki ID to be specified: Maki, stay focused. I'll provide the firepower.

passive.name: Ignition Rounds
passive.description: Hinawa's basic attacks fire his shotgun to consume ammunition within 4 shells. He reloads over a few seconds after expending all shells or withholding leftover shells for a while. Reload time is reduced by Hinawa's level and bonus attack speed. Reload can be interrupted by declaring an attack or casting an ability.

mechanics.reloadScaling: Reduced by level and bonus attack speed
mechanics.reloadInterrupt: Can be cancelled by attack or ability use

h1.name: Controlled Bounce
h1.description: Hinawa fires a bullet in target direction. If hitting a champion, wall, large or epic monster, the bullet ricochets at a 90° angle, dealing physical damage on first hit and 120% damage on ricochet.

h2.name: Ballistic Transfer
h2.description: Hinawa empowers shotgun for 2.5 seconds, gaining bonus attack speed and causing basic attacks to bounce to additional surrounding enemies. If triggering attack crits, bounces crit for 175% damage. Ricochet deals 65% damage to minions and executes if below 15 health.

bounceEffect.targeting: Each enemy can be hit up to one additional time per attack
priority: Nearest target if no new targets

effects.basicAttackReset: Gaining buff resets basic attack timer
effects.targetVisibility: Does not require targets to be visible

h3.name: Ricochet Control
h3.description: Hinawa switches to submachine rifle and fires burst of bullets upward in an arc, landing in circular area after 0.8 seconds and dealing physical damage. Area becomes desecrated for 4 seconds, slowing enemies and inflicting Grievous Wounds.

h4.name: Final Shot
h4.description: Hinawa channels for up to 10 seconds drawing his long rifle, entering sniper stance. Becomes immobilized and unable to use other abilities; moving cancels stance. Camera shifts to first-person scoped view. Can fire up to 4 powerful shots within duration. Damage increases based on target's missing health (0%-300%). Shots can critically strike.

missingHealthScaling.mechanics: Damage increases the lower enemy health

lore:
Takehisa Hinawa is the stoic Second Company Lieutenant of Special Fire Force Company 8. A former military man, he carries his strict discipline and precision into battle, treating every shot as absolute and every decision as calculated. Though he wields no flashy flames of his own, Hinawa's mastery of Second Generation pyrokinetic abilities allows him to control and amplify bullets, turning ordinary firearms into devastating weapons that can pierce through infernos and strike with lethal accuracy.

Behind his cold, expressionless demeanor lies a man devoted to order and the safety of his comrades. Hinawa values efficiency over emotion, often acting as the steady anchor of Company 8 in the chaos of combat. His presence is both feared and respected—whether delivering calm commands or a merciless trigger pull, Hinawa ensures that the flames of destruction are met with unwavering precision and justice.
